reason: Consolidated authorization for PR #54 (Ghost validation): (1) weekly audit scripts — fail-closed exit-code guards in bash (PIPESTATUS) and PowerShell ($LASTEXITCODE), dynamic log naming, correct tools/ci_gate.py path, set -e, REPO_ROOT setup, mkdir -p, python3 usage; (2) root-level weekly-audit.ps1 convenience wrapper delegating to tools/weekly-audit.ps1; (3) mk2-alteration-gate CI workflow — checkout PR head SHA to isolate PR-only diff; (4) PR template — replace intent-file checklist with authorization-record checklist; (5) ci_gate.py — remove phantom jason approver requirement, use allowlist for authorizedBy validation only.
